mapper.insert: INSERT INTO languages (resume_id, language_name, proficiency_level, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{languageName}, #{proficiencyLevel}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM languages WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id, language_name, proficiency_level, sort_order, created_at FROM languages WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id FROM languages WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
